caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, greyish-white hairstyle, glasses, and over-ear headphones sits in a room filled with clothing and framed photos. He wears a white button-down shirt with tan suspenders and a small red bowtie. A black microphone is positioned in front of him. In the background, clothing racks feature garments labeled "LEE," and several framed images are mounted on the wall. The "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" logo, which includes a graphic of a microphone, appears on the screen. As the sequence progresses, the man remains seated and maintains a similar posture, but his facial expressions shift slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing. The background and equipment remain static throughout the clip, focusing the action on the man's speaking gestures.
